heading: Steps
body:
To load sample data into the specified cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters sampleData load <clusterName> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters sampleData load](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-sampleData-load).

After you run the command to load sample data, you can use
the following Atlas CLI commands to monitor the status of the
sample data load job:

To return the details for the specified sample data load job using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters sampleData describe <id> [options]

```

To watch the specified sample data job in your cluster until it completes using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters sampleData watch <id> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas clusters sampleData describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-sampleData-describe) and
[atlas clusters sampleData watch](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-sampleData-watch).

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
